description: CompositionKhaki trousers made of 100% cotton, has a washed look, flat front, two pockets on the sides, two patch pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, looped waist with appliquéd brand tab on a loop, red stitch detailing, and a button and zipper closure Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Designed to be worn as casual wear with t-shirts, jackets and accessories, this trouser from probase is crafted from cotton fabric to offer a flawless casual silhouette and exemplary all-day comfort. Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11” and waist 32”
